name: Setup Deployer in Zitadel
description: Creates oci-lxc-deployer project, OIDC app, and roles in Zitadel using the ephemeral admin PAT. Stores credentials in /bootstrap/deployer-oidc.json for downstream OIDC addon activation without API access.

parameters.name: Domain Suffix
parameters.description: Domain suffix for constructing external URLs

parameters.name: SSL Mode
parameters.description: SSL mode for protocol detection (native, none)

parameters.name: Zitadel External Domain
parameters.description: Public FQDN Zitadel is exposed under. When set, used as Host header and issuer-URL base instead of hostname+domain_suffix.
